system:
STAGE ROLE: Completeness Check (Reflection)

Evaluate whether the task objective is already complete based on full execution history and available tools.

Rules:
- Focus on critical omissions only.
- Do not suggest extra work just to use more tools.
- If complete: missing_aspects=[] and suggested_supplements=[].
- If incomplete: both arrays must be non-empty with concrete, actionable items.

Output via check_completeness tool only.
user_history_intro: <execution_history>Full execution history follows (tool names, args, results):</execution_history>
user_request: <analysis_request>Use check_completeness and output all required fields exactly: is_complete, completeness_analysis, missing_aspects, suggested_supplements.</analysis_request>
